title: tokaua's PvP Pack
description: A collection of mods that help improve the PvP experience.
body:
###
A PvP Modpack


![<3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f794f612b4f2f3d1c9154cdf3981293df0ae8a8_0.webp)

This modpack aims to be performance friendly, while also including the most popular features
that are used by players.

### > Features <

1.7/1.8 blockhit animations on servers that support blocking
Pre-1.19.4 damage tilt
Freelook
Optifine Zoom
Coordinates, FPS, and Armor HUD Elements
& a ton of performance mods

Mod List - [Animatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/zy0karK1) by Mixces, lowercasebtw - [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) by shedaniel - [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/yjgIrBjZ) by axieum - [BetterPlayerList](https://modrinth.com/mod/UQa12H0S) by azurejelly - [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/89Wsn8GD) by Cael - [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/MOqt4Z5n) by OBro1961 - [Cloth Config v20](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel - [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/ETlrkaYF) by Kir\_Antipov - [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL) by FabricMC - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811 - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/ohNO6lps) by Fuzs - [Freelook](https://modrinth.com/mod/g4pR0Fmy) by Celibistrial - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK\_01 - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) by tuxed - [Legacy Potion Colors](https://modrinth.com/mod/OdojgWfl) by lowercasebtw - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name - [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codAaoxh) by Motschen - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX \- PR0CESS, 1Foxy2 - [Nametag Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/HORzKF5l) by Microcontrollers - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQyHxfxd) by Aizistral - [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/Kw7Sm3Xf) by Noxcrew - [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese - [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZP7xHXtw) by dima\_dencep - [Simple Hud Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/PE656UHx) by SoRadGaming - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/9eGKb6K1) by Max Henkel - [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/DWuwk8aA) by lowercasebtw, FlashyReese, AMereBagatelle - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese - [Tiltbreak](https://modrinth.com/mod/AVQnOXtr) by StyStatic - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR) by isXander - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) by isXander
